unicode_basic.description: Basic Unicode set including arrows, shapes, and simple glyphs.

unicode_extended.description: Extended math, technical, and block glyphs.

custom_compound.description: Compound symbol constructions combining base glyphs.
custom_compound.strategy: Concatenation of existing symbols to build extended semantics

math_fractional.description: Abstract math-based representations for symbolic ratios (P/R/S logic)
math_fractional.encoding: prefix/root/suffix = x/y/z where each position is fractional representation

encoding_format.storage: Escaped unicode or visual symbol rendering
encoding_format.validation: All symbols must be unique and decode into prefix-root-suffix components if present.

assignment_rules.symbol_uniqueness: No duplicate symbols across PrefixIndex, RootIndex, or SuffixIndex unless explicitly allowed in compound class.
